name: osed
description: Open Source Environmental Defense — skills that draft environmental-litigation instruments (citizen-suit notices, rulemaking petitions, deadline complaints, consent-decree scaffolds, state environmental-rights orientation packets). OSED drafts; a licensed attorney decides.

courtlistener_api_key.title: CourtListener API token
courtlistener_api_key.description: Optional CourtListener API token for verify_citation (case-law currency). Keyless sources work without it.

regulations_gov_api_key.title: Regulations.gov API key
regulations_gov_api_key.description: Optional Regulations.gov API key for find_rulemaking_documents. Keyless sources work without it.
